ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF BENITA CHIU MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFTS ITS BURDEN AND TO SHOW THAT THE JUDGMENT IN THE PRIOR ACTION IS VOID ON ITS FACE AS A A MATTER OF LAW; FAILED TO CITE ANY BINDING AUTHORITY ON POINT STANDING FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A MONEY JUDGMENT MAY ONLY BE AWARDED IF AVOIDANCE OF TRANSFER IS NOT AVAILABLE; AND FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN RE: TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BECAUSE THE DETERMINATION AS TO WHETHER A JUDGMENT IS VOID IS FACTUALLY DRIVEN, AS IS EVIDENT FROM THE CASES CITED BY THE MOVING PARTY, AND THE MATERIAL FACTS ARE NOT LISTED IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Duy Thai, 415.296.9927 for Defendant Charles Li.

The Court tentative ruling ordered Plaintiff and her counsel Mr. Disston to be present. Neither are present.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance And Testimony, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patrick Grochmal, Esq. of the Law Office of Duy Thai, T:415.981.3100, for defendant and moving party;
Niceforo Avila, Esq. of the Avila Law Office, T:669.800.9035, for plaintiff and opposing party.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. After arguments, DFENDANT CHARLES LI's Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance And Testimony, And For Sanctions is Granted.

Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Set For Trial On Jan-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Niceforo Avila, Esq. 669-800-9035 for Plaintiff.
Duy Thai, Esq. 415-296-9927 for Defendant CHARLES LI.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CHARLES LI's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission.

Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is Denied without Prejudice. The Court will prepare an Order.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Duy Thai, 415.296.9927 for Defendant Charles Li.
Niceford Avila, Jr. for Plaintiff Benita Chiu no card provided.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF BENITA CHIU MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is DENIED. Moving party failed to shifts its burden and to show that the judgment in the prior action is void on its face as a a matter of law; failed to cite any binding authority on point standing for the proposition that a money judgment may only be awarded if avoidance of transfer is not available; and failed to shift its burden re: triable issue of fact because the determination as to whether a judgment is void is factually driven, as is evident from the cases cited by the moving party, and the material facts are not listed in the separate statement. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2019 Continued To Sep-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
